Notifications_Welcome.Title: Welcome to Blood & Barter
Notifications_Welcome.Text: Good luck out there, {PLAYER}. Stay sharp.

Notifications_Live.Title: Radio Intercept
Notifications_Live.Text: Scouts report a military convoy was ambushed near the northwest airfield. Supplies may still be intact.

Notifications_Live.Title: Emergency Broadcast
Notifications_Live.Text: WARNING: Increased infected activity detected in Elektrozavodsk and Chernogorsk. Avoid city centers or proceed with caution.

Notifications_Live.Title: Survivor Radio
Notifications_Live.Text: A helicopter went down somewhere in the northern hills. Crash site may contain military-grade equipment.

Notifications_Live.Title: Radio Chatter
Notifications_Live.Text: Traders at Green Mountain and Kumyrna report fresh stock. Medical supplies and ammunition available.

Notifications_Live.Title: Trade Network
Notifications_Live.Text: The Green Mountain and Kumyrna trading posts are open for business. Safe zones enforced — no weapons drawn.

Notifications_Live.Title: Warning
Notifications_Live.Text: Contaminated zone activity has shifted. Check your NBC gear before approaching military installations.

Notifications_Live.Title: Survivor Tip
Notifications_Live.Text: Hunting lodges and deer stands in the forests often have overlooked supplies. Don't forget to check the backroads.

Notifications_Live.Title: Emergency Broadcast
Notifications_Live.Text: A large horde has been spotted moving through Stary Sobor. Survivors in the area should relocate immediately.

Notifications_Live.Title: Radio Intercept
Notifications_Live.Text: Unconfirmed reports of an abandoned military cache near Tisy. High risk, high reward.

Notifications_Live.Title: Server
Notifications_Live.Text: Server restart in approximately 1 hour. Your progress is saved automatically.

Notifications_Live.Title: Server
Notifications_Live.Text: Server restart in approximately 10 minutes. Find shelter and log out safely.
